name: testimonials-wall
title: Testimonials Wall
description: A dense wall-of-love: a heading above a multi-column masonry of compact testimonial cards, each with author, optional role, and avatar.

preview.summary: Heading above a multi-column masonry of compact testimonial cards (a wall of love).

sampleContent.title: Loved by the community.
sampleContent.description: Hundreds of teams ship on Acme every day. Here is what a few of them told us.

testimonials.quote: Acme is really extraordinary and very practical, no need to break your head. A real gold mine.
testimonials.author: Jonathan Yombo

testimonials.quote: With no experience in web design I redesigned my entire site in a few minutes thanks to Acme.
testimonials.author: Yves Kalume

testimonials.quote: I absolutely love Acme! The blocks are beautifully designed and easy to use.
testimonials.author: Oketa Fred

testimonials.quote: Using Acme has been like unlocking a secret design superpower — stunning and user-friendly.
testimonials.author: Zeki

testimonials.quote: Acme has transformed the way I develop web applications. The flexibility is unmatched.
testimonials.author: Joseph Kitheka

testimonials.quote: Acme is elegant, clean, and responsive — very helpful to start fast with a project.
testimonials.author: Khatab Wedaa
